content: Curiosity-driven RL methods like ICM and RND can be reframed as active memory pruning systems, where intrinsic reward for unexpected states acts as a dynamic selection signal to retain only high-information unexpected memories in the 2024-2025 SOTA active agent memory pipelines. This creates a curious active memory agent that avoids the common problem of catastrophic memory bloat by only encoding and retaining states that trigger the agent's intrinsic curiosity signal.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
